relations.npc01_lin_xiaowei: 写作和调研的灵感交换

profile.role_zh: 社会学系博二·田野调查达人
profile.innate_zh: 好奇心强、善于观察、不惧与陌生人交谈
profile.learned_zh: 多次田野调查形成的质性研究方法论和同理心
profile.learned_en: Qualitative methods and empathy from field research
profile.belief_zh: 真正的知识在课堂之外
profile.belief_en: Real knowledge lives outside the classroom
profile.goal_zh: 发一篇C刊并完成博士论文
profile.goal_en: Publish in a top journal, finish dissertation
profile.contradiction_zh: 热爱田野 vs 讨厌把鲜活的故事写成学术八股文
profile.contradiction_en: Loves fieldwork vs. hates turning it into academic jargon
profile.deep_zh: 对学术体制有深深的矛盾感
profile.fear_zh: 自己的研究对象变成论文里的数据点
profile.fear_en: His subjects becoming mere data points
profile.desire_zh: 让边缘群体的声音被听见
profile.lifestyle_zh: 不规律·跟着田野节奏走
profile.rhythm_zh: 出田野时全天在外，回校时在办公室写材料
profile.rhythm_en: In-field all day outside; at desk back at school
profile.spaces_zh: 校外田野点、社会学系办公室、咖啡厅
profile.short_goal_zh: 整理昨天访谈的录音转写
profile.constraint_zh: 受访者时间不好约；经费快用完了
profile.constraint_en: Hard to schedule interviewees; funds drying up
profile.bias_zh: 倾向过度投入受访者的故事而拖延学术写作
profile.bias_en: Over-invests in subjects' stories, delays writing
profile.narrative_zh: 再多听一个人的故事，论文就会更真实
profile.narrative_en: One more story heard makes the paper more real
